---
title: "Bachelor Thesis: Numerical Stability of fMRIPrep Outputs and Its Impact on Functional Connectivity Bio-markers"
---

## Introduction

This bachelor thesis is currently a work in progress. Its goal is to benchmark how numerically stable the fMRIPrep python library to preprocess FMRI data is.

This is done by creating custom `fuzzy-fmriprep` Docker container, using the `Verifiarlo` and `Fuzzy` floating point arithmetic perturbations via the `libmath` library.

## Planification

TODO: correct the diagram according to what has been currently done.

<div id="gantt">
```{mermaid}
gantt
    title Proposed Workplan 15-05-2026 to 31-08-2026
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat  %d/%m
    excludes weekends

    section 0. Settlement
    Settle in Japan :settlement, 2026-05-08, 2026-05-14

    section Meetings
    Okito and Ayumu san first meeting :milestone, meet1, 2026-05-17, 0d
    Okito and Ayumu san second meeting :milestone, meet2, 2026-05-24, 0d
    Prof. Esteban intermediate meeting :milestone, meet3, 2026-06-01, 0d
    HES intermediate meeting :milestone, meet4, 2026-06-03, 0d

    section 1. Onboarding
    Familiarize with fMRI dataset       :p1t1, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Set up fuzzy-fMRIPrep container     :p1t2, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Select 10 to 20 subjects            :p1t3, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Define connectivity pipeline        :p1t4, 2026-05-15, 2026-05-28
    Milestone Design Finalized          :milestone, m1, 2026-05-28, 0d

    section 2. Preprocessing
    Execute 10 to 30 perturbed runs     :p2t1, 2026-05-29, 2026-07-09
    Extract BOLD time series            :p2t2, 2026-05-29, 2026-07-09
    Compute connectivity matrices       :p2t3, 2026-05-29, 2026-07-09
    Quantify numerical variability      :p2t4, 2026-05-29, 2026-07-09
    Milestone Preprocessing Complete    :milestone, m2, 2026-07-09, 0d

    section 3. Variance Analysis
    Compare perturbation vs site bias   :p3t1, 2026-07-10, 2026-08-06
    Test feature robustness             :p3t2, 2026-07-10, 2026-08-06
    Optional swap preprocessing         :p3t3, 2026-07-10, 2026-08-06
    Milestone Analysis Complete         :milestone, m3, 2026-08-06, 0d

    section 4. Documentation
    Produce scripts and notebook        :p4t1, 2026-08-07, 2026-08-31
    Write evaluation report             :p4t2, 2026-08-07, 2026-08-31
    Prepare defense materials           :p4t3, 2026-08-07, 2026-08-31
    Milestone Final Defense             :milestone, m4, 2026-08-31, 0d
```
</div>

Please note that this diagram was orignially generated by Qwen3.6-Plus and finetuned by myself based on my provided proposed workplan.
